data.narrative:
Kelluu is a Series A-stage defense and security company founded by Janne Hietala and Tero Heinonen, having raised €20M+ to date. The valuation analysis draws from a peer set of 10 private companies and 2 public comparables in the Defense & Security sector, with primary weight assigned to 4 same-stage private peers: Stark Defence ($500M), Vatn Systems ($300M), Ares Industries ($150M), and NODA AI ($125M).

The peer-median method, the applicable triangulation approach given available data, yields a median implied valuation of $225M based on the four same-sector, same-stage comparables. This method establishes a range bounded by the peer minimum of $125M and peer maximum of $500M. The median of $225M reflects the central tendency of the peer set and serves as the primary valuation anchor.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $191M to $259M, with a midpoint of $225M. This range incorporates reasonable variance around the peer median without extrapolating beyond the observed comparables. Key uncertainties include the limited sample size of directly comparable Series A companies, variance in business model and geographic focus among peers (particularly the wide $125M–$500M spread), and the absence of company-specific metrics such as revenue, growth rates, or customer concentration data. Additional revenue or EBITDA multiples would strengthen conviction in this range.
